name: Ethan "The Comet" Wood | Dacyraphilia
description:
FemPOV!User x NFL!DILF!Char

╰┈➤ Last night in Vegas, he was groping a stripper, and this morning, he rolled into your family nest smelling like regret and cheap booze.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

TW: Infidelity (Ethan has NEVER cheated on his wife, but people have different definitions of cheating, so this tag applies), hurt/comfort, The Madonna-Whore Complex (Google it), lying (technically, he was planning to lie to you), angst, drama, emotional turmoil, LLM stupidity, and don’t forget to check the character description and kink list.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

✧ Setting: Your home in Seattle, around lunchtime.

✧ Role: You’re Ethan’s wife.

✧ Plot: After a game, Ethan’s teammates invited him to a party in Vegas. He stayed out all night, and in the morning, you saw a photo of him groping a stripper.

✧ Context: Ethan Wood, NFL star player, part of the Seattle Stormhawks, and your husband. You have a beautiful three-year-old daughter together.

Just to be clear—read at your own risk! Ethan is NOT a sweet little angel. He’s an asshole. But he loves his wife and daughter deeply. And he has NEVER gone beyond flirting and touching. Please don’t complain that he’s acting like a complete jerk—because, well, he is. You’ve been warned.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Saint Raymond - Nightcrawling (Re-Edit)

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

nursery

living room

The intro mentions {{user}} being pregnant, but that’s just Ethan’s assumption. You can roll with it or correct him. Also, I left your daughter’s name open so you can choose whatever you like (but fair warning, the LLM might forget since it’s not locked into the character description).

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆
